name: Bug fix

predicate: the original failure no longer reproduces
a regression test covers the bug and passes
the full test suite passes with no new failures

stopConditions: the bug cannot be reproduced and the report lacks enough detail to reproduce it
the root cause is a guess rather than an evidenced diagnosis
the fix would change product behavior beyond restoring the expected behavior
the bug exposes a security issue and the disclosure or severity standard is undeclared
a gate's required decision is still pending (pending is not approved)
